name: Marcus van der Berg
summary: Platform Engineer with 8+ years of experience designing and managing production Kubernetes clusters at scale. Expertise in container orchestration, GitOps workflows, and cloud-native infrastructure. Proven track record of improving system reliability, reducing deployment times, and implementing security best practices. Strong advocate for automation and Infrastructure as Code.

experience.title: Senior Kubernetes Engineer
bullets: Architected and managed 15+ production Kubernetes clusters across AWS EKS and Azure AKS serving 500+ microservices
Implemented GitOps workflow using ArgoCD, reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to 5 minutes
Designed multi-cluster federation strategy enabling seamless workload distribution across regions
Built comprehensive observability platform with Prometheus, Grafana, and Loki, achieving 99.95% uptime SLA
Implemented Istio service mesh for traffic management, mTLS, and canary deployments
Reduced cloud infrastructure costs by 35% through right-sizing, spot instances, and Karpenter autoscaling
Led security hardening initiative implementing OPA policies, Pod Security Standards, and network policies
Mentored 4 junior engineers and conducted weekly knowledge-sharing sessions

experience.title: Platform Engineer
bullets: Migrated legacy VM-based infrastructure to Kubernetes, reducing operational overhead by 50%
Developed Helm charts and Kustomize overlays for 80+ application deployments
Implemented Vault integration for secrets management across all clusters
Created custom Kubernetes operators using Go for automated database provisioning
Built CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions deploying 200+ releases per week
Established disaster recovery procedures with cross-region backup and restore capabilities

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
bullets: Containerized 30+ applications using Docker, establishing container best practices
Managed initial Kubernetes adoption using GKE for client projects
Implemented monitoring solutions using Prometheus and Grafana
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform across multiple cloud providers
Reduced deployment failures by 60% through improved CI/CD pipeline design
